notes: All 9 reps are structurally faithful — they transcribe the full form including the GDPR boilerplate with no fabricated/invented content, so hallucination lists are empty throughout. Quality differences are purely OCR accuracy on handwritten fields (surname Almiñana Moropsa, DNI 20041185C, phone 635889002, applicant email joansnobc@gmail.com) and two printed-text slips that recur across reps: Nº Borrador read as 412 instead of 42, and the registry-email domain 'registrodelapropiedad.org' instead of the printed 'registrodelapropriedad.org' — per judging rules these are misreads (key_misses), not hallucinations. Lower temperatures (0.1/0.4) are more stable; t0.7 shows more garbled reads (wrong Entrada digit, 'gnail.com', 'Moragas'). t0.4|rep0 edges ahead on the closest DNI/address reads.
